case_title: BRIAN P CHRISTIAN VS. VIRGINIA YING

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO FEB-29-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-04-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PLTFF'S DECLARATION:DEFT.NOT SERVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN, BRIAN P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA $3,237.56 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,298.56, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT PLUS ACCRUED INTEREST IN THE SOME OF $312.56, REDUCED BY CHARGES FOR CLEANING, REPLACEMENT OF THE LIGHT FIXTURE COVER, AND REPAIR OF SCRATCHES IN THE FLOORING IN THE TOTAL SUM OF $600.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,968.66 FILED BY CHRISTIAN, BRIAN P AS TO DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-05-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,776.44 FILED BY YING, VIRGINIA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, BRIAN P ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED APR-05-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, BRIAN P
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-29-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT YING, VIRGINIA AS TO PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN, BRIAN P
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-05-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YING, VIRGINIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, BRIAN P STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
